Home / Services / Smart Irrigation Controllers

Smart Irrigation Controllers

Weather-responsive technology that saves water and money.

Upgrade to a smart controller that automatically adjusts watering based on Sacramento's microclimates. Our most popular models:

• Rachio 3: Ideal for tech-savvy homeowners in newer Elk Grove developments
• RainMachine: Perfect for larger lots in Folsom with multiple zones

We program each system with local weather data and Sacramento County's watering restrictions already configured. Receive alerts when systems malfunction during our summer thunderstorms or when water pressure drops.

Includes smartphone control so you can adjust settings when away from home - especially useful for snowbirds who winter elsewhere but need to maintain Sacramento properties. Compatible with existing systems in homes of any age.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Assessment of current wiring and zone configuration
  2. 02 Step 2: Selection of optimal controller for your property size
  3. 03 Step 3: Professional installation with WiFi setup
  4. 04 Step 4: Personalized training on mobile app features

Benefits

  • Automatically skips watering after Folsom rain
  • Saves 15-30% on summer water bills
  • Prevents fines for watering on wrong days
  • Remote monitoring from any location

Frequently Asked Questions

Will this work with my 1980s irrigation system?

Yes, we adapt new controllers to work with older wiring found in Carmichael and Orangevale homes.

How does it handle Sacramento's sudden temperature swings?

Controllers use hyperlocal weather data to increase watering before heat waves and reduce during cool spells.

What if my WiFi goes down?

Systems continue working on pre-set schedules until connectivity resumes.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with smart irrigation controllers? Contact us today.
